verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All ye saints of light proclaim, Jesus, the light of the world; Life and mercy in His name, Jesus, the light of the world.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We'll walk in the light, the beautiful light, Come where the dewdrops of mercy are bright; Shine all around us by day and by night, Jesus, the light of the world.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hear the Saviour's earnest call, Jesus, the light of the world; Send the Gospel truth to all, Jesus, the light of the world.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Why not seek Him then today, Jesus, the light of the world; Go with truth the narrow way, Jesus, the light of the world.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come, confess Him as your King, Jesus, the light of the world; Then the bells of heaven will ring, Jesus, the light of the world.
